pain_points: Extended outages increasing customer churn probability
Radio equipment failure and cell site power failures affecting handoffs
Core network split-brain and signaling storms causing cyclical failures
HSS database corruption or synchronization issues affecting subscriber authentication
Rogue network attempts and SS7 security attacks
MME software bugs and resource exhaustion causing service degradation
Dropped calls during mobility and interrupted data sessions
use_cases: Identify systematic infrastructure failures through pattern analysis
Detect unusual subscriber population changes invisible to traditional error rate monitoring
Identify MME software bugs or resource exhaustion before total outage
Alert on unusual subscriber authentication patterns before help desk is overwhelmed
Filter noise and only alert on serious multi-dimensional problems
Detect security attacks or roaming misconfigurations
Detect core network split-brain or signaling storms across multiple hosts
Detect mass authentication failure events from HSS database issues
Monitor 4G and 5G network for issues and proactively take action
Identify cell tower handoff cascade failures from infrastructure problems
customer_context.scale: 500+ unique subscribers affected per incident, 2-5 MME hosts, 50+ cell IDs
metrics: Multi-lag spike detection across IMSI and cell dimensions
Unique cell ID count changes (cell_id_change_1 > 50, cell_id_change_2 > 25)
Percent change in IMSI and cell ID cardinality
